code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn process(_ tok: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      v
    else
      0
    end
  when None
    0
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut start = 0 - 1

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      sum = sum + process(tok)
      start = 0 - 1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  sum = sum + process(tok)
end

println("sum_even=#{sum}")
